activities.name: Copy data Load Medallia EDW Invitations

source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH Precomputed_Division AS (
    SELECT 
        Gg.SURVEY_ID,
        Gg.EXTERNAL_ID,
        Gg.VALUE,
        Gg.Brand,GG.CONTACT
				,GG.ADDRESS
				,GG.STATE
				,GG.CITY
				,GG.ZIP
				,GG.PHONE
				,GG.EMAIL
				,GG.RESPONSE_DATE,
        CASE 
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Mad City Window%' THEN 'MAC'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Pacific Bath%' THEN 'PBC'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Statewid%' THEN 'SWR'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%FHIA%' THEN 'FHI'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Max%' THEN 'MXH'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Rite Window%' THEN 'RTW'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Home Smart%' THEN 'HSI'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Renuity%' THEN 'PHI'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Closet America%' THEN 'CTA'
        END AS Computed_Division
    FROM 
        ODS.test_GUILD_QUALITY_customer_survey Gg
),
GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1 AS (
    SELECT 
        PD.SURVEY_ID,
        J.CUSTOMERID,
        J.LEADID,
        J.JOBID,
        J.LP_CUSTOMERID,
        J.LP_LEADID,
        J.INSTALLERID_1,
        J.InstallerID_2,
        J.InstallerID_3,
        J.InstallerID_4,
        J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,
        J.LP_InstallerID_2,
        J.LP_InstallerID_3,
        J.LP_InstallerID_4 
    FROM 
        Precomputed_Division PD
    LEFT JOIN 
        EDW.FACT_JOB J 
    ON 
        PD.Computed_Division = J.DIVISION 
        AND PD.EXTERNAL_ID = J.CONTRACTID 
        AND ROUND(PD.VALUE, 2) = ROUND(J.GROSSAMOUNT, 2)
    LEFT JOIN 
        EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS 
    ON 
        J.DIVISION = JS.DIVISION 
        AND J.JobStatusId = JS.JobStatusID
    WHERE 
        J.JOBID IS NOT NULL  
        AND JS.LP_JOBSTATUSCATEGORYID NOT IN ('3', '5')
),
GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_2 AS 
(
SELECT G.SURVEY_ID,G.CUSTOMERID,J.LEADID,J.JOBID, 
	   J.LP_CUSTOMERID,J.LP_LEADID, 
	   J.INSTALLERID_1,J.InstallerID_2,J.InstallerID_3,J.InstallerID_4,
	   J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,J.LP_InstallerID_2,J.LP_InstallerID_3,J.LP_InstallerID_4 
	FROM (
			SELECT DISTINCT
				G.SURVEY_ID,G.RESPONSE_DATE,G.EXTERNAL_ID,G.VALUE AS AMOUNT,(CASE 
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Mad City Window%'	THEN 'MAC'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Pacific Bath%'				THEN 'PBC'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Statewid%'		THEN 'SWR'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%FHIA%'			THEN 'FHI'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Max%'					THEN 'MXH'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Rite Window%'		THEN 'RTW'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
							When g.Brand like'%Home Smart%'				THEN 'HSI'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Renuity%'					THEN 'PHI'
                            WHEN g.Brand like'%Closet America%'            THEN 'CTA' 
						END) as brand,COALESCE(C1.CUSTOMERID,C.CUSTOMERID--,C2.CUSTOMERID,C3.CUSTOMERID
				) AS CUSTOMERID
				FROM 

		
				Precomputed_Division G
				LEFT JOIn GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1 T on G.Survey_Id=T.Survey_ID	
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C1 ON  g.Computed_Division=C1.DIVISION
												AND G.CONTACT=CONCAT(C1.FIRSTNAME,' ',C1.LASTNAME) 
												AND G.ADDRESS=C1.ADDRESS1 
												AND G.CITY=C1.CITY 
												AND G.STATE=C1.STATE
												AND G.ZIP=C1.ZIP
												AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(G.PHONE,'(',''),') ',''),'-','')=C1.PHONE
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C ON g.Computed_Division=C.DIVISION AND G.EMAIL=C.EMAIL
				WHERE T.Survey_id is null 
		 ) G 
		LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON G.CUSTOMERID=J.CUSTOMERID AND G.BRAND=J.DIVISION AND Round(G.AMOUNT,2) =Round(J.GROSSAMOUNT,2)---5555
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.DIVISION=JS.DIVISION AND J.JobStatusId=JS.JobStatusID
		
	WHERE J.JOBID IS NOT NULL  AND JS.LP_JOBSTATUSCATEGORYID not in ('3','5')
	
),

GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_3 AS 
(
SELECT G.SURVEY_ID,G.CUSTOMERID,J.LEADID,J.JOBID, 
	   J.LP_CUSTOMERID,J.LP_LEADID, 
	   J.INSTALLERID_1,J.InstallerID_2,J.InstallerID_3,J.InstallerID_4,
	   J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,J.LP_InstallerID_2,J.LP_InstallerID_3,J.LP_InstallerID_4 
	FROM (
		Select (CASE 
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Mad City Window%'	THEN 'MAC'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Pacific Bath%'				THEN 'PBC'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Statewid%'		THEN 'SWR'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%FHIA%'			THEN 'FHI'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Max%'					THEN 'MXH'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Rite Window%'		THEN 'RTW'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
							When g.Brand like'%Home Smart%'				THEN 'HSI'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Renuity%'					THEN 'PHI'
                            WHEN g.Brand like'%Closet America%'            THEN 'CTA' 
						END ) as brand,G.Survey_ID,G.EXTERNAL_ID,
			   G.Value as Amount, 
		       Coalesce(C1.CustomerID,C2.CustomerID) as CustomerID
			from Precomputed_Division G
				LEFT JOIn GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1 T on G.Survey_Id=T.Survey_ID	 
				LEFT JOIn GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_2 T1 on G.Survey_Id=T1.Survey_ID
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C1 ON  g.Computed_Division=C1.DIVISION AND G.ADDRESS=C1.ADDRESS1 AND G.ZIP=C1.ZIP
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C2 ON  g.Computed_Division=C2.DIVISION AND G.ADDRESS=C2.ADDRESS1 AND  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(G.PHONE,'(',''),') ',''),'-','')=C2.PHONE
			where T.Survey_id is null and T1.Survey_id is null

		) G 
		LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON G.CUSTOMERID=J.CUSTOMERID AND G.brand=J.DIVISION AND Round(G.AMOUNT,2) =Round(J.GROSSAMOUNT,2)
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.DIVISION=JS.DIVISION AND J.JobStatusId=JS.JobStatusID
		
	WHERE J.JOBID IS NOT NULL  AND JS.LP_JOBSTATUSCATEGORYID not in ('3','5')
),

GUILD_QUALITY_WITH_LEAD AS 
(
Select * 
from 
	(	
		Select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1
		UNION ALL
		Select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_2
		UNION ALL
		Select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_3
	)A 
),

GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_FINAL AS 
(
Select 
	G.Survey_ID,
	Response_date,
	G.Program,
	CASE  WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', Contact) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(Contact, 1, LEN(Contact) - CHARINDEX(' ', REVERSE(Contact)))  ELSE Contact  END AS First_Name,
	CASE  WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', Contact) > 0 THEN REVERSE(SUBSTRING(REVERSE(Contact), 1, CHARINDEX(' ', REVERSE(Contact)) - 1))  ELSE Contact  END AS Last_Name,
	EMAIL as Email_Address,
	Replace(Replace(Replace(Phone,'(',''),')',''),'-','') as Phone_number,
	GD.LP_LEADID	as Lead_ID,
	NULL			as Product_line_InstallationExperience,
	NULL			as Date_to_survey,
	'Usa'			as Country,
	'English'		as Language, 
	NULL			as Account,
	NULL			as Unit,
	NULL			as Sales_REP_ID  ,
	(CASE 
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Mad City Window%'	THEN 'MAC'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Pacific Bath%'				THEN 'PBC'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Statewid%'		THEN 'SWR'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%FHIA%'			THEN 'FHI'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Max%'					THEN 'MXH'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Rite Window%'		THEN 'RTW'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
							When g.Brand like'%Home Smart%'				THEN 'HSI'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Renuity%'					THEN 'PHI'
                            WHEN g.Brand like'%Closet America%'            THEN 'CTA' 
						END )			as Brand_name,
	NULL			as Sales_REP_ID_2,
	NULL			as Sales_branch_name, 
	NULL			as Sold,
	NULL			as Appointment_Date,
	Development_Cycle,
	NULL 			as 	Sales_Organization,
	NULL 			as 	Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations,
	NULL 			as 	Main_Metric,
	NULL 			as 	Service_Datetime,
	NULL 			as 	Service_Technician_ID,
	NULL 			as 	Service_Technician_Name   ,
	NULL 			as 	Account_ID   ,
	External_ID   	as 	Contract_ID,
	Channel,
	NULL 			as Production_branch_name   ,
	NULL 			as Reporting_Market   ,
	NULL 			as Reporting_Market_Type   ,
	NULL 			as Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience   ,
	NULL 			as Social_Unit_ID   ,
	SalesRepresentative,
	NULL 			as Service_Technician_2   ,
	NULL 			as Service_Technician_3   ,
	NULL 			as Service_Technician_4   ,
    Surveystatus,
	Creationdate as CreationDate,
	NULL as ExpiryDate,
	(CASE 
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Mad City Window%'	THEN 'MAC'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Pacific Bath%'				THEN 'PBC'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Statewid%'		THEN 'SWR'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%FHIA%'			THEN 'FHI'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Max%'					THEN 'MXH'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Rite Window%'		THEN 'RTW'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
							When g.Brand like'%Home Smart%'				THEN 'HSI'
							WHEN g.Brand like'%Renuity%'					THEN 'PHI'
                            WHEN g.Brand like'%Closet America%'            THEN 'CTA' 
						END ) as Division,
	Template,
	Old_Survey_Id,
	Value,
	ContactCreationDate,
	ProjectStartDate,
	SecondaryEmail 			   	  	 as SecondaryEmail							,
	SecondaryPhone 			      	 as SecondaryPhone							,
	NeedsAction 			      	 as Needs_Action  							,
	Notes 					      	 as Notes										,
	GoogleReviewBoost		      	 as Google_Review_Boost						,
	'Guild Quality' as SurveyFlag  ,
	GD.JOBID,
	GD.CUSTOMERID,
	GD.LEADID AS EDW_LeadID,
	GD.LP_CUSTOMERID,
	--GD.LP_LEADID, 
	GD.INSTALLERID_1,
	GD.InstallerID_2,
	GD.InstallerID_3,
	GD.InstallerID_4,
	GD.LP_INSTALLERID_1,
	GD.LP_InstallerID_2,
	GD.LP_InstallerID_3,
	GD.LP_InstallerID_4,
	G.completionMode
		FROM [ODS].[Test_GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY] G
				LEFT JOIN GUILD_QUALITY_WITH_LEAD GD on G.Survey_ID=GD.SURVEY_ID

)

--select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_FINAL


Select B.* from (
SELECT DIstinct 
M1.Survey_ID,
M1.Response_Date,
cast(M1.Program as varchar(256)) 																													 as Program,
M1.CustomerID,
M1.LeadID,
cast(CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Rep_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(M1.Division,'-',M1.Sales_Rep_ID) ELSE LD_M.SalesRep1_EmployeeID END as varchar(256)) 	 AS SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
cast(LD_M.SalesRep2_EmployeeID as varchar(256)) 																									 as SalesRep2_EmployeeID,
LD_M.BranchID,
LD_M.ApptDate,
Cast(M1.ContractID as varchar(256))																													 as ContractID,
Cast(M1.Division as varchar(32))              																									     as Division,
Cast(CASE WHEN M1.Service_Technician_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(M1.Division,'-',M1.Service_Technician_ID) ELSE M1.InstallerID_1 END as varchar(100)) AS InstallerID_1,
cast(M1.InstallerID_2 as varchar(100)) 																												 as InstallerID_2,
cast(M1.InstallerID_3 as varchar(100)) 																												 as InstallerID_3,
cast(M1.InstallerID_4 as varchar(100)) 																												 as InstallerID_4,
Cast(M1.Product_Line_InstallationExperience as varchar(256)) 																						 as Product_Line_InstallationExperience,
cast(M1.Date_To_Survey as datetime) as date_to_Survey,
cast(M1.Country  as varchar(32)) 																													 as Country,
cast(M1.Language as varchar(32)) 																													 as Language,
Cast(M1.Unit as INT) as Unit,
M1.Sold,
Cast(M1.DevelopmentCycle  as varchar(256)) 																											 as DevelopmentCycle,
Cast(M1.SalesOrganization as varchar(256)) 																											 as SalesOrganization,  
cast(M1.Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations as varchar(256)) 																						 as Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations,
cast(M1.Main_Metric as INT) 																														 as Main_Metric,
cast(M1.Service_Datetime as [datetime2](7))  as Service_Datetime,
cast(M1.Channel as varchar(256)) 																													 as Channel ,
cast(M1.Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience as varchar(256)) 																					 as Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience,
Cast(M1.Social_Unit_ID as varchar(256)) 																											 as Social_Unit_ID,
cast(M1.Template   as varchar(100))                               														as Template,	
cast(M1.GuildQuality_Survey_Id    as varchar(100))               														as GuildQuality_Survey_Id,
Cast(ISNULL(M1.Amount,0) as Decimal(16,2)) 																				as Amount                                    ,
cast(M1.Surveystatus   as varchar(100))                            													as Survey_status ,
cast(M1.Customer_Creation_Date   as [datetime2](7)) 																	as Customer_Creation_Date                   ,
cast(M1.Project_Start_Date       as [datetime2](7)) 																	as Project_Start_Date                       ,
cast(M1.Creationdate             as [datetime2](7)) 																	as Creationdate                             ,
cast(M1.ExpiryDate             as [datetime2](7)) 																	as ExpiryDate                             ,
cast(M1.Needs_Action  	as varchar(8000)) 																			as Needs_Action						,
cast(M1.Notes	as varchar(8000))							                                                            as Notes                           ,
cast(M1.Google_Review_Boost as varchar(8000))				                                                            as Google_Review_Boost             ,
cast(M1.SurveyFlag as varchar(100))																						as SurveyFlag	 ,																																		------------------- ends here
cast(M1.LP_CustomerID as varchar(256))																					as LP_CustomerID,
cast(M1.LP_LeadID     as varchar(256))																					as LP_LeadID,
cast(CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Rep_ID is not null then M1.Sales_Rep_ID ELSE LD_M.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID END as varchar(256)) as LP_SalesRepEmployeeID_1,
cast(LD_M.LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID as varchar(256))																		as LP_SalesRepEmployeeID_2,
cast(LD_M.LP_BranchID as varchar(50))																					as LP_BranchID,
CASE WHEN M1.Service_Technician_ID is not null then M1.Service_Technician_ID ELSE M1.LP_InstallerID_1 END			    as LP_InstallerID_1,
cast(M1.LP_InstallerID_2 as varchar(100)) 																				as LP_InstallerID_2,
cast(M1.LP_InstallerID_3 as varchar(100)) 																				as LP_InstallerID_3,
cast(M1.LP_InstallerID_4 as varchar(100)) 																				as LP_InstallerID_4,
Cast(M1.LastUpdatedTs as [datetime2](7)) 																				as LastUpdatedTs,
cast(M1.ReportingMarketID		   as varchar(100)) 																	as ReportingMarketID		,
cast(M1.LP_ReportingMarketID	   as varchar(100)) 																	as LP_ReportingMarketID		,
cast(M1.LP_ReportingMarketTypeID   as varchar(100)) 																	as LP_ReportingMarketTypeID,
cast(M1.ReportingMarketTypeID      as varchar(100)) 																	as ReportingMarketTypeID   ,
cast(LD_M.ProductID				   as varchar(100)) 																	as ProductID				,
cast(LD_M.LP_ProductID			   as varchar(100)) 																	as LP_ProductID			,
cast(M1.Account 				   as varchar(100)) 																	as Medallia_AccountID,
cast(M1.Sales_Rep_ID 			   as varchar(100)) 																	as Medallia_SalesRepID1,
cast(M1.Service_Technician_ID 	   as varchar(100)) 																	as Medallia_ServiceTechID1,
cast(COALESCE(M1.Active,DE.Active) as varchar(10))																		as SalesRepActiveFlag , 		--into #T_Fact_medallia,
cast(M1.completionMode as varchar(256))																				     as completionMode,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY M1.Survey_ID ORDER BY LD_M.EntryDate DESC) as rownum
FROM 
(

		SELECT 
				A.Survey_ID,
				substring(Response_Date,1,10)+' '+substring(Response_Date,12,8) as Response_Date,
				A.Program,
				A.CustomerID,
				A.EDW_LeadID AS LEADID,
				A.Contract_ID AS ContractID,
				A.Division,
				A.InstallerID_1,
				A.InstallerID_2,
				A.InstallerID_3,
				A.InstallerID_4,
				A.Product_Line_InstallationExperience,
				A.Date_To_Survey,
				A.Country,
				A.[Language],
				A.Unit,
				Case when A.sold is NULL 	then '0'
					 when A.Sold='Not Sold' then '0' 
					 Else '1' END as Sold,
				A.Development_Cycle  as DevelopmentCycle,
				A.Sales_Organization as SalesOrganization,
				A.Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations,
				A.Main_Metric,
				A.Service_Datetime,
				A.Channel,
				A.Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience,
                A.Sales_Rep_ID,
                A.Service_Technician_ID,
				A.Social_Unit_ID,
				A.Template                                  ,
				A.Old_Survey_ID as GuildQuality_Survey_Id                    ,
				A.Value 		as Amount                                    ,
				A.Surveystatus                             ,
				substring(A.ContactCreationDate,1,10)+' '+substring(A.ContactCreationDate,12,8) as Customer_Creation_Date                    ,
				A.ProjectStartDate 		as Project_Start_Date                        ,
				substring(A.Creationdate,1,10)+' '+substring(A.Creationdate,12,8) as CreationDate                            ,
				A.ExpiryDate											,
				A.Needs_Action  									 ,
				A.Notes								             ,
				A.Google_Review_Boost					             ,
				A.SurveyFlag   				                 ,
				A.LP_CustomerID,
				A.Lead_ID AS LP_LEADID,
				A.LP_InstallerID_1,
				A.LP_InstallerID_2,
				A.LP_InstallerID_3,
				A.LP_InstallerID_4,
				GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTs,
				B.ReportingMarketID,
				B.LP_ReportingMarketID,
				B.LP_ReportingMarketTypeID,
				B.ReportingMarketTypeID,
                NULL  as Active,
				A.completionMode,
                A.ACCOUNT
				
				
			FROM  
				(	
					SELECT * FROM GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_FINAL where surveystatus<>'Completed'
				) A
			 
			LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B 
			ON A.Production_branch_name=B.LongName AND A.Division = B.Division
			--Where A.Survey_ID='303024'

	
	) M1
	
	LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_LEAD LD_M ON M1.LeadID = LD_M.LeadID
    LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE DE ON LD_M.SalesRep1_EmployeeID=DE.EmployeeID) B
	where B.rownum=1


	--select top 10 * from [EDW].[FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey]

dependsOn.activity: Copy data Load Medallia EDW Invitations

source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH Precomputed_Division AS (
    SELECT 
        Gg.SURVEY_ID,
        Gg.EXTERNAL_ID,
        Gg.VALUE,
        Gg.Brand,GG.CONTACT
				,GG.ADDRESS
				,GG.STATE
				,GG.CITY
				,GG.ZIP
				,GG.PHONE
				,GG.EMAIL
				,GG.RESPONSE_DATE,
        CASE 
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Mad City Window%' THEN 'MAC'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Pacific Bath%' THEN 'PBC'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Statewid%' THEN 'SWR'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%FHIA%' THEN 'FHI'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Max%' THEN 'MXH'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Rite Window%' THEN 'RTW'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Home Smart%' THEN 'HSI'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Renuity%' THEN 'PHI'
            WHEN gg.Brand LIKE '%Closet America%' THEN 'CTA'
        END AS Computed_Division
    FROM 
        ODS.test_GUILD_QUALITY_customer_survey Gg
), GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1 AS 
(
SELECT G.SURVEY_ID,J.CUSTOMERID,J.LEADID,J.JOBID, 
	   J.LP_CUSTOMERID,J.LP_LEADID, 
	   J.INSTALLERID_1,J.InstallerID_2,J.InstallerID_3,J.InstallerID_4,
	   J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,J.LP_InstallerID_2,J.LP_InstallerID_3,J.LP_InstallerID_4 
	FROM 
		Precomputed_Division G
		LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON g.Computed_Division=J.DIVISION AND G.EXTERNAL_ID=J.CONTRACTID AND Round(G.VALUE,2) =Round(J.GROSSAMOUNT,2)---5555
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.DIVISION=JS.DIVISION AND J.JobStatusId=JS.JobStatusID
		
	WHERE J.JOBID IS NOT NULL  AND JS.LP_JOBSTATUSCATEGORYID not in ('3','5')

),
GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_2 AS 
(
SELECT G.SURVEY_ID,G.CUSTOMERID,J.LEADID,J.JOBID, 
	   J.LP_CUSTOMERID,J.LP_LEADID, 
	   J.INSTALLERID_1,J.InstallerID_2,J.InstallerID_3,J.InstallerID_4,
	   J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,J.LP_InstallerID_2,J.LP_InstallerID_3,J.LP_InstallerID_4 
	FROM (
			SELECT DISTINCT
				G.SURVEY_ID,G.RESPONSE_DATE,G.EXTERNAL_ID,G.VALUE AS AMOUNT,(CASE 
							WHEN Brand like'%Mad City Window%'	THEN 'MAC'
							WHEN Brand like'%Pacific Bath%'				THEN 'PBC'
							WHEN Brand like'%Statewid%'		THEN 'SWR'
							WHEN Brand like'%FHIA%'			THEN 'FHI'
							WHEN Brand like'%Max%'					THEN 'MXH'
							WHEN Brand like'%Rite Window%'		THEN 'RTW'
							WHEN Brand like'%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
							When Brand like'%Home Smart%'				THEN 'HSI'
							WHEN Brand like'%Renuity%'					THEN 'PHI'
                            WHEN Brand like'%Closet America%'            THEN 'CTA' 
						END )as Brand,COALESCE(C1.CUSTOMERID,C.CUSTOMERID--,C2.CUSTOMERID,C3.CUSTOMERID
				) AS CUSTOMERID
				FROM 
				Precomputed_Division G
				LEFT JOIn GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1 T on G.Survey_Id=T.Survey_ID	
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C1 ON  g.Computed_Division=C1.DIVISION
												AND G.CONTACT=CONCAT(C1.FIRSTNAME,' ',C1.LASTNAME) 
												AND G.ADDRESS=C1.ADDRESS1 
												AND G.CITY=C1.CITY 
												AND G.STATE=C1.STATE
												AND G.ZIP=C1.ZIP
												AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(G.PHONE,'(',''),') ',''),'-','')=C1.PHONE
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C ON g.Computed_Division=C.DIVISION AND G.EMAIL=C.EMAIL
				WHERE T.Survey_id is null 
		 ) G 
		LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON G.CUSTOMERID=J.CUSTOMERID AND g.brand=J.DIVISION AND Round(G.AMOUNT,2) =Round(J.GROSSAMOUNT,2)---5555
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.DIVISION=JS.DIVISION AND J.JobStatusId=JS.JobStatusID
		
	WHERE J.JOBID IS NOT NULL  AND JS.LP_JOBSTATUSCATEGORYID not in ('3','5')
	
),

GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_3 AS 
(
SELECT G.SURVEY_ID,G.CUSTOMERID,J.LEADID,J.JOBID, 
	   J.LP_CUSTOMERID,J.LP_LEADID, 
	   J.INSTALLERID_1,J.InstallerID_2,J.InstallerID_3,J.InstallerID_4,
	   J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,J.LP_InstallerID_2,J.LP_InstallerID_3,J.LP_InstallerID_4 
	FROM (
		Select (CASE 
							WHEN Brand like'%Mad City Window%'	THEN 'MAC'
							WHEN Brand like'%Pacific Bath%'				THEN 'PBC'
							WHEN Brand like'%Statewid%'		THEN 'SWR'
							WHEN Brand like'%FHIA%'			THEN 'FHI'
							WHEN Brand like'%Max%'					THEN 'MXH'
							WHEN Brand like'%Rite Window%'		THEN 'RTW'
							WHEN Brand like'%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
							When Brand like'%Home Smart%'				THEN 'HSI'
							WHEN Brand like'%Renuity%'					THEN 'PHI'
                            WHEN Brand like'%Closet America%'            THEN 'CTA' 
						END ) as Brand,G.Survey_ID,G.EXTERNAL_ID,
			   G.Value as Amount, 
		       Coalesce(C1.CustomerID,C2.CustomerID) as CustomerID
			from Precomputed_Division G
				LEFT JOIn GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1 T on G.Survey_Id=T.Survey_ID	 
				LEFT JOIn GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_2 T1 on G.Survey_Id=T1.Survey_ID
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C1 ON  g.Computed_Division=C1.DIVISION AND G.ADDRESS=C1.ADDRESS1 AND G.ZIP=C1.ZIP
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C2 ON  g.Computed_Division=C2.DIVISION AND G.ADDRESS=C2.ADDRESS1 AND  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(G.PHONE,'(',''),') ',''),'-','')=C2.PHONE
			where T.Survey_id is null and T1.Survey_id is null

		) G 
		LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON G.CUSTOMERID=J.CUSTOMERID AND g.brand=J.DIVISION AND Round(G.AMOUNT,2) =Round(J.GROSSAMOUNT,2)
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.DIVISION=JS.DIVISION AND J.JobStatusId=JS.JobStatusID
		
	WHERE J.JOBID IS NOT NULL  AND JS.LP_JOBSTATUSCATEGORYID not in ('3','5')
),

GUILD_QUALITY_WITH_LEAD AS 
(
Select * 
from 
	(	
		Select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1
		UNION ALL
		Select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_2
		UNION ALL
		Select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_3
	)A 
),	

GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_FINAL AS 
(
Select 
	G.Survey_ID,
	Response_date,
	G.Program,
	CASE  WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', Contact) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(Contact, 1, LEN(Contact) - CHARINDEX(' ', REVERSE(Contact)))  ELSE Contact  END AS First_Name,
	CASE  WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', Contact) > 0 THEN REVERSE(SUBSTRING(REVERSE(Contact), 1, CHARINDEX(' ', REVERSE(Contact)) - 1))  ELSE Contact  END AS Last_Name,
	EMAIL as Email_Address,
	Replace(Replace(Replace(Phone,'(',''),')',''),'-','') as Phone_number,
	GD.LP_LEADID	as Lead_ID,
	NULL			as Product_line_InstallationExperience,
	NULL			as Date_to_survey,
	'Usa'			as Country,
	'English'		as Language, 
	NULL			as AccountId,
	NULL			as Unit,
	NULL			as Sales_REP_ID_1  ,
	(CASE 
							WHEN Brand like'%Mad City Window%'	THEN 'MAC'
							WHEN Brand like'%Pacific Bath%'				THEN 'PBC'
							WHEN Brand like'%Statewid%'		THEN 'SWR'
							WHEN Brand like'%FHIA%'			THEN 'FHI'
							WHEN Brand like'%Max%'					THEN 'MXH'
							WHEN Brand like'%Rite Window%'		THEN 'RTW'
							WHEN Brand like'%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
							When Brand like'%Home Smart%'				THEN 'HSI'
							WHEN Brand like'%Renuity%'					THEN 'PHI'
                            WHEN Brand like'%Closet America%'            THEN 'CTA' 
						END )			as Brand_name,
	NULL			as Sales_REP_ID_2,
	NULL			as Sales_Branch_name, 
	NULL			as Sold,
	NULL			as Appointment_date,
	Development_Cycle,
	NULL 			as 	Sales_Organization,
	NULL 			as 	Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations,
	NULL 			as 	Main_Metric,
	NULL 			as 	Service_Datetime,
	NULL 			as 	Service_Technician_ID,
	NULL 			as 	Service_Technician_Name   ,
	NULL 			as 	Client_Account_ID   ,
	External_ID   	as 	Contract_ID,
	Channel,
	NULL 			as Production_branch_name   ,
	NULL 			as Reporting_Market   ,
	NULL 			as Reporting_Market_Type   ,
	NULL 			as Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience   ,
	NULL 			as Social_Unit_ID   ,
	SalesRepresentative,
	NULL 			as Service_Technician_2   ,
	NULL 			as Service_Technician_3   ,
	NULL 			as Service_Technician_4   ,
	NULL 			as On_Site_Quote_Satisfaction_Team_Score   ,
	NULL 			as Reason_for_Score   ,
	NULL 			as Sales_Understanding   ,
	NULL 			as Sales_Communication   ,
	NULL 			as Sales_Punctuality   ,
	NULL 			as Sales_Professionalism   ,
	NULL 			as Sales_Product_Knowledge   ,
	NULL 			as Completeness_of_Information   ,
	NULL 			as Received_Quote   ,
	NULL 			as Satisfaction_with_Quote   ,
	NULL 			as Quote_Project_Start_Date   ,
	NULL 			as Product_Demo   ,
	NULL 			as Product_Demo_Benefits   ,
	NULL 			as Reason_for_not_moving_forward   ,
	NULL 			as Decided_Against_Other   ,
	NULL 			as Final_Comment   ,
	Service_NPS   ,
	NULL 			as Reasons_for_your_score   ,
	NULL 			as Give_more_Feedback   ,
	In_Home_Sales_Rating   ,
	Install_Team_Rating   ,
	Installation_Rating  ,
	Product_Walkthrough   ,
	Experience_Rating   ,
	Satisfaction_Rating   ,
	Area_for_Improvement   ,
	Area_of_Satisfaction   ,
	Testimonial   ,
	Additional_Comments ,
	Creationdate as Creation_Date,
	NULL as Expiry_Date,
	Brand as Division,
	In_Home_Sales_Comments   ,
	Install_Team_Comments   ,
	Installation_Comments   ,
	Demonstration   ,
	Experience_Comments   ,
	Likely_To_Recommend   ,
	Satisfaction_Comments   ,
	Testimonial_Comments   ,
	Areas_For_Improvement_Rating   ,
	Areas_For_Improvement_Comment   ,
	Areas_Of_Satisfaction_Rating   ,
	Areas_Of_Satisfaction_Comment   ,
	Template,
	Old_Survey_Id,
	Value,
	Surveystatus,
	ContactCreationDate,
	ProjectStartDate,
	SatisfactionScore ,
	SecondaryEmail 			   	  	 as SecondaryEmail							,
	SecondaryPhone 			      	 as SecondaryPhone							,
	NeedsAction 			      	 as Needs_Action  							,
	Notes 					      	 as Notes										,
	GoogleReviewBoost		      	 as Google_Review_Boost						,
	VIPProgramAwarenessChoice     	 as VIP_Program_Awareness_Choice				,
	VIPProgramAwarenessComment    	 as VIP_Program_Awareness_Comment				,
	Testimonial_Choice		      	 as Testimonial_Choice						,
	Testimonial_Comment 	      	 as Testimonial_Comment						,
	ReferralProgramAwareness_Choice	 as Referral_Program_Awareness_Choice	,
	ReferralProgramAwareness_Comment as Referral_Program_Awareness_Comment   ,
	'Guild Quality' as SurveyFlag  ,
	GD.JOBID,
	GD.CUSTOMERID,
	GD.LEADID AS EDW_LeadID,
	GD.LP_CUSTOMERID,
	--GD.LP_LEADID, 
	GD.INSTALLERID_1,
	GD.InstallerID_2,
	GD.InstallerID_3,
	GD.InstallerID_4,
	GD.LP_INSTALLERID_1,
	GD.LP_InstallerID_2,
	GD.LP_InstallerID_3,
	GD.LP_InstallerID_4,
	G.completionMode
		FROM ODS.test_GUILD_QUALITY_customer_survey G
				LEFT JOIN GUILD_QUALITY_WITH_LEAD GD on G.Survey_ID=GD.SURVEY_ID

)
--select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_FINAL

Select B.* from (
SELECT DIstinct 
M1.Survey_ID,
M1.Response_Date,
cast(M1.Program as varchar(256)) 																													 as Program,
M1.CustomerID,
M1.LeadID,
cast(CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Rep_ID_1 IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(M1.Division,'-',M1.Sales_Rep_ID_1) ELSE LD_M.SalesRep1_EmployeeID END as varchar(256)) 	 AS SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
cast(LD_M.SalesRep2_EmployeeID as varchar(256)) 																									 as SalesRep2_EmployeeID,
LD_M.BranchID,
LD_M.ApptDate,
Cast(M1.ContractID as varchar(256))																													 as ContractID,
Cast(M1.Division as varchar(32))              																									     as Division,
Cast(CASE WHEN M1.Service_Technician_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(M1.Division,'-',M1.Service_Technician_ID) ELSE M1.InstallerID_1 END as varchar(100)) AS InstallerID_1,
cast(M1.InstallerID_2 as varchar(100)) 																												 as InstallerID_2,
cast(M1.InstallerID_3 as varchar(100)) 																												 as InstallerID_3,
cast(M1.InstallerID_4 as varchar(100)) 																												 as InstallerID_4,
Cast(M1.Product_Line_InstallationExperience as varchar(256)) 																						 as Product_Line_InstallationExperience,
cast(M1.Date_To_Survey as datetime) as Date_To_Survey,
cast(M1.Country  as varchar(32)) 																													 as Country,
cast(M1.Language as varchar(32)) 																													 as Language,
Cast(M1.Unit as INT) as Unit,
M1.Sold,
Cast(M1.DevelopmentCycle  as varchar(256)) 																											 as DevelopmentCycle,
Cast(M1.SalesOrganization as varchar(256)) 																											 as SalesOrganization,  
cast(M1.Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations as varchar(256)) 																						 as Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations,
cast(M1.Main_Metric as INT) 																														 as Main_Metric,
cast(M1.Service_Datetime as [datetime2](7)) as Service_Datetime	,
cast(M1.Channel as varchar(256)) 																													 as Channel ,
cast(M1.Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience as varchar(256)) 																					 as Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience,
Cast(M1.Social_Unit_ID as varchar(256)) 																											 as Social_Unit_ID,
CASE WHEN M1.On_Site_Quote_Satisfaction_Team_Score in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.On_Site_Quote_Satisfaction_Team_Score as INT) END 			 as On_Site_Quote_Satisfaction_Team_Score,
Cast(M1.Reason_for_Score as varchar(8000)) 																				as Reason_for_Score,
CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Understanding in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Sales_Understanding as INT) END 					as Sales_Understanding,
CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Communication in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Sales_Communication as INT) END 					as Sales_Communication,
CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Punctuality in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Sales_Punctuality as INT) END 						AS Sales_Punctuality,
CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Professionalism in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Sales_Professionalism as INT) END 				AS Sales_Professionalism,
CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Product_Knowledge in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Sales_Product_Knowledge as INT) END 			AS Sales_Product_Knowledge,
CASE WHEN M1.Completeness_Of_Information in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Completeness_Of_Information AS INT) END   AS Completeness_Of_Information,
Cast(M1.Received_Quote as varchar(256)) 																				as Received_Quote,
CASE WHEN M1.Satisfaction_With_Quote in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Satisfaction_With_Quote as INT) END 			AS Satisfaction_With_Quote,
Cast(M1.Quote_Project_Start_Date as varchar(256)) 																		as Quote_Project_Start_Date,
Cast(M1.Product_Demo as varchar(256)) 																					as Product_Demo,
CASE WHEN M1.Product_Demo_Benefits in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Product_Demo_Benefits as INT) END 				AS Product_Demo_Benefits,
cast(M1.Reason_For_Not_Moving_Forward as varchar(8000)) 																as Reason_For_Not_Moving_Forward,
cast(M1.Decided_Against_Other as varchar(8000)) 																		as Decided_Against_Other ,
cast(M1.Final_Comment as varchar(8000)) 																				as Final_Comment,
CASE WHEN M1.Service_NPS in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Service_NPS as INT) END 									AS Service_NPS,
cast(M1.Reasons_For_Your_Score as varchar(8000)) 																		as Reasons_For_Your_Score,
cast(M1.Give_More_Feedback     as varchar(256))  																		as  Give_More_Feedback,
CASE WHEN M1.In_Home_Sales in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.In_Home_Sales as INT) END 								as In_Home_Sales,
CASE WHEN M1.Install_Team in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Install_Team as INT) END 								as Install_Team,
CASE WHEN M1.Installation in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE Cast(M1.Installation as INT) END 								AS Installation,
CASE WHEN M1.Product_Walkthrough in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Product_Walkthrough as INT) END 					as Product_Walkthrough,
CASE WHEN M1.Experience in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE  CAST(M1.Experience as INT) END 									as Experience,
CASE WHEN M1.Satisfaction in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Satisfaction as INT) END 								as Satisfaction,
cast(M1.Area_For_Improvement as varchar(8000)) 																			as Area_For_Improvement,
cast(M1.Area_Of_Satisfaction as varchar(8000)) 																			as Area_Of_Satisfaction,
cast(M1.Testimonial							  	 as varchar(256))    													as Testimonial							  		,
cast(M1.Additional_Comments						 as varchar(8000))    													as Additional_Comments									,
cast(M1.Testimonial_Additional_Comments			 as varchar(8000))   													as Testimonial_Additional_Comments				,  ----------New columns for GUILD Quality survey data starts here
cast(M1.Demonstration_Additional_Comments   	 as varchar(8000))   													as Demonstration_Additional_Comments   		 ,
cast(M1.Experience_Additional_Comments      	 as varchar(8000))   													as Experience_Additional_Comments      		  ,
cast(M1.Likely_To_Recommend_Additional_Comments  as varchar(8000))   													as Likely_To_Recommend_Additional_Comments ,
cast(M1.Satisfaction_Additional_Comments         as varchar(8000))   													as Satisfaction_Additional_Comments        ,
cast(M1.In_Home_Sales_Additional_Comments        as varchar(8000))   													as In_Home_Sales_Additional_Comments       ,
cast(M1.Install_Team_Additional_Comments         as varchar(8000))   													as Install_Team_Additional_Comments        ,
cast(M1.Installation_Additional_Comments         as varchar(8000))   													as Installation_Additional_Comments        ,
cast(M1.Area_For_Improvement_Additional_Comments as varchar(8000))   													as Area_For_Improvement_Additional_Comments  ,
cast(M1.Area_Of_Satisfaction_Additional_Comments as varchar(8000))   													as Area_Of_Satisfaction_Additional_Comments  ,
CASE WHEN M1.Area_For_Improvement_Rating in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Area_For_Improvement_Rating as INT) END 	as Area_For_Improvement_Rating,
CASE WHEN M1.Area_Of_Satisfaction_Rating in ('NA','N/A') THEN '' ELSE CAST(M1.Area_Of_Satisfaction_Rating as INT) END 	as Area_Of_Satisfaction_Rating,
cast(M1.Template   as varchar(100))                               														as Template,	
cast(M1.GuildQuality_Survey_Id    as varchar(100))               														as GuildQuality_Survey_Id,
Cast(ISNULL(M1.Amount,0) as Decimal(16,2)) 																				as Amount                                    ,
cast(M1.Survey_status   as varchar(100))                            													as Survey_status ,
cast(M1.Customer_Creation_Date   as [datetime2](7)) 																	as Customer_Creation_Date                   ,
cast(M1.Project_Start_Date       as [datetime2](7)) 																	as Project_Start_Date                       ,
cast(M1.Creationdate             as [datetime2](7)) 																	as Creationdate                             ,
cast(Replace(M1.Satisfaction_Score_in_Percentage,'%','') 	as INT)														as Satisfaction_Score_in_Percentage      ,
cast(M1.Needs_Action  	as [varchar](8000)) 																			as Needs_Action						,
cast(M1.Notes	as [varchar](8000))							                                                            as Notes                           ,
cast(M1.Google_Review_Boost as [varchar](8000))				                                                            as Google_Review_Boost             ,
cast(M1.VIP_Program_Awareness_Choice as varchar(32)	)																	as VIP_Program_Awareness_Choice    ,
cast(M1.VIP_Program_Awareness_Comment	as [varchar](8000))	                                                            as VIP_Program_Awareness_Comment   ,
cast(M1.Testimonial_Choice	as varchar(32))	 	                														as Testimonial_Choice              ,
cast(M1.Testimonial_Comment as [varchar](8000))				                                                            as Testimonial_Comment             ,
cast(M1.Referral_Program_Awareness_Choice as varchar(32))																as Referral_Program_Awareness_Choice ,
cast(M1.Referral_Program_Awareness_Comment as [varchar](8000))															as Referral_Program_Awareness_Comment,
cast(M1.SurveyFlag as varchar(100))																						as SurveyFlag	 ,																																		------------------- ends here
cast(M1.LP_CustomerID as varchar(256))																					as LP_CustomerID,
cast(M1.LP_LeadID     as varchar(256))																					as LP_LeadID,
cast(CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Rep_ID_1 is not null then M1.Sales_Rep_ID_1 ELSE LD_M.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID END as varchar(256)) as LP_SalesRepEmployeeID_1,
cast(LD_M.LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID as varchar(256))																		as LP_SalesRepEmployeeID_2,
cast(LD_M.LP_BranchID as varchar(50))																					as LP_BranchID,
CASE WHEN M1.Service_Technician_ID is not null then M1.Service_Technician_ID ELSE M1.LP_InstallerID_1 END			    as LP_InstallerID_1,
cast(M1.LP_InstallerID_2 as varchar(100)) 																				as LP_InstallerID_2,
cast(M1.LP_InstallerID_3 as varchar(100)) 																				as LP_InstallerID_3,
cast(M1.LP_InstallerID_4 as varchar(100)) 																				as LP_InstallerID_4,
Cast(M1.LastUpdatedTs as [datetime2](7)) 																				as LastUpdatedTs,
cast(M1.ReportingMarketID		   as varchar(100)) 																	as ReportingMarketID		,
cast(M1.LP_ReportingMarketID	   as varchar(100)) 																	as LP_ReportingMarketID		,
cast(M1.LP_ReportingMarketTypeID   as varchar(100)) 																	as LP_ReportingMarketTypeID,
cast(M1.ReportingMarketTypeID      as varchar(100)) 																	as ReportingMarketTypeID   ,
cast(LD_M.ProductID				   as varchar(100)) 																	as ProductID				,
cast(LD_M.LP_ProductID			   as varchar(100)) 																	as LP_ProductID			,
cast(M1.Account_ID 				   as varchar(100)) 																	as Medallia_AccountID,
cast(M1.Sales_Rep_ID_1 			   as varchar(100)) 																	as Medallia_SalesRepID1,
cast(M1.Service_Technician_ID 	   as varchar(100)) 																	as Medallia_ServiceTechID1,
cast(COALESCE(M1.Active,DE.Active) as varchar(10))																		as SalesRepActiveFlag , 		--into #T_Fact_medallia,
cast(M1.completionMode as varchar(256))																				     as completionMode,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY M1.Survey_ID ORDER BY LD_M.EntryDate DESC) as rownum
FROM 
(

		SELECT 
				A.Survey_ID,
				substring(Response_Date,1,10)+' '+substring(Response_Date,12,8)as Response_Date,
				A.Program,
				A.CustomerID,
				A.EDW_LeadID AS LEADID,
				A.Contract_ID AS ContractID,
				(CASE 
							WHEN A.Division like'%Mad City Window%'	THEN 'MAC'
							WHEN A.Division like'%Pacific Bath%'				THEN 'PBC'
							WHEN A.Division like'%Statewid%'		THEN 'SWR'
							WHEN A.Division like'%FHIA%'			THEN 'FHI'
							WHEN A.Division like'%Max%'					THEN 'MXH'
							WHEN A.Division like'%Rite Window%'		THEN 'RTW'
							WHEN A.Division like'%Paradise Home%' THEN 'PHI'
							When A.Division like'%Home Smart%'				THEN 'HSI'
							WHEN A.Division like'%Renuity%'					THEN 'PHI'
                            WHEN A.Division like'%Closet America%'            THEN 'CTA' 
						END ) as Division,
				A.InstallerID_1,
				A.InstallerID_2,
				A.InstallerID_3,
				A.InstallerID_4,
				A.Product_Line_InstallationExperience,
				cast(A.Date_To_Survey as datetime) as Date_To_Survey,
				A.Country,
				A.[Language],
				A.Unit,
				Case when A.sold is NULL 	then '0'
					 when A.Sold='Not Sold' then '0' 
					 Else '1' END as Sold,
				A.Development_Cycle  as DevelopmentCycle,
				A.Sales_Organization as SalesOrganization,
				A.Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations,
				A.Main_Metric,
				A.Service_Datetime,
				A.Channel,
				A.Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience,
                A.Sales_Rep_ID_1,
                A.Service_Technician_ID,
				A.Social_Unit_ID,
				A.On_Site_Quote_Satisfaction_Team_Score,
				A.Reason_for_Score,
				A.Sales_Understanding,
				a.Sales_Communication,
				A.Sales_Punctuality,
				A.Sales_Professionalism,
				A.Sales_Product_Knowledge,
				A.Completeness_Of_Information,
				A.Received_Quote,
				A.Satisfaction_With_Quote,
				A.Quote_Project_Start_Date,
				A.Product_Demo,
				A.Product_Demo_Benefits,
				A.Reason_For_Not_Moving_Forward,
				A.Decided_Against_Other,
				A.Final_Comment,
				A.Service_NPS,
				A.Reasons_For_Your_Score,
				A.Give_More_Feedback,
				A.In_Home_Sales_Rating as In_Home_Sales,
				A.Install_Team_Rating as Install_Team,
				A.Installation_Rating as Installation,
				a.Product_Walkthrough,
				A.Experience_Rating as Experience,
				A.Satisfaction_Rating as Satisfaction,
				A.Area_For_Improvement,
				A.Area_Of_Satisfaction,
				A.Testimonial,
				A.Additional_Comments,
				A.Testimonial_Comments			as Testimonial_Additional_Comments		,
				A.Demonstration   				as Demonstration_Additional_Comments    ,
				A.Experience_Comments   		as Experience_Additional_Comments        ,
				A.Likely_To_Recommend   		as Likely_To_Recommend_Additional_Comments ,
				A.Satisfaction_Comments 		as Satisfaction_Additional_Comments        ,
				A.In_Home_Sales_Comments		as In_Home_Sales_Additional_Comments       ,
				A.Install_Team_Comments 		as Install_Team_Additional_Comments        ,
				A.Installation_Comments 		as Installation_Additional_Comments        ,
				A.Areas_For_Improvement_Comment as Area_For_Improvement_Additional_Comments  ,
				A.Areas_Of_Satisfaction_Comment as Area_Of_Satisfaction_Additional_Comments  ,
				A.Areas_For_Improvement_Rating  as Area_For_Improvement_Rating,
				A.Areas_Of_Satisfaction_Rating  as Area_Of_Satisfaction_Rating,
				A.Template                                  ,
				A.Old_Survey_ID as GuildQuality_Survey_Id                    ,
				A.Value 		as Amount                                    ,
				A.Surveystatus       as Survey_Status                      ,
				substring(A.ContactCreationDate,1,10)+' '+substring(A.ContactCreationDate,12,8)  as Customer_Creation_Date                    ,
				A.ProjectStartDate 		as Project_Start_Date                        ,
				substring(A.Creation_date,1,10)+' '+substring(A.Creation_date,12,8)  as CreationDate                            ,
				A.SatisfactionScore 	as Satisfaction_Score_in_Percentage          ,
				A.Needs_Action  									 ,
				A.Notes								             ,
				A.Google_Review_Boost					             ,
				A.VIP_Program_Awareness_Choice		             ,
				A.VIP_Program_Awareness_Comment		             ,
				A.Testimonial_Choice					             ,
				A.Testimonial_Comment					             ,
				A.Referral_Program_Awareness_Choice	             ,
				A.Referral_Program_Awareness_Comment			,
				A.SurveyFlag   				                 ,
				A.LP_CustomerID,
				A.Lead_ID AS LP_LEADID,
				A.LP_InstallerID_1,
				A.LP_InstallerID_2,
				A.LP_InstallerID_3,
				A.LP_InstallerID_4,
				GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTs,
				B.ReportingMarketID,
				B.LP_ReportingMarketID,
				B.LP_ReportingMarketTypeID,
				B.ReportingMarketTypeID,
                NULL  as Active, 
				A.completionMode,
                null as ACCOUNT_ID
				
				
			FROM  
				(	
					SELECT * FROM GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_FINAL
				) A
			 
			LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B 
			ON A.Production_branch_name=B.LongName AND A.Division = B.Division
			--Where A.Survey_ID='303024'
			
	
	) M1
	
	LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_LEAD LD_M ON M1.LeadID = LD_M.LeadID
    LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE DE ON LD_M.SalesRep1_EmployeeID=DE.EmployeeID) B
	where B.rownum=1 and survey_Status='Completed'

scripts.text:
Update EDW.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey
Set ActiveInd='1'
Where Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey where  
CAST(Response_Date as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  --and
---CAST(updatedAt as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  and 
--CAST(lastActivityAt as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))
and Survey_ID not in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey_Invitations where Survey_Status in ('No Response','Abandoned','In Progress','Scheduled') 
))

Update EDW.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey
Set ActiveInd='1'
Where Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey where  
CAST(Response_Date as Date) BETWEEN DATEADD(mm,-3,EOMONTH(CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))) AND DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  -- and
--CAST(updatedAt as Date) BETWEEN DATEADD(mm,-3,EOMONTH(CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))) AND DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  and 
--CAST(lastActivityAt as Date) BETWEEN DATEADD(mm,-3,EOMONTH(CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))) AND DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))
and Survey_ID not in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey_Invitations where Survey_Status in ('No Response','Abandoned','In Progress','Scheduled')
))

Update EDW.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey
Set ActiveInd='0'
Where Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey where  
CAST(Response_Date as Date) BETWEEN DATEADD(mm,-3,EOMONTH(CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))) AND DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) ----and
--CAST(updatedAt as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  and 
--CAST(lastActivityAt as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) 
and Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.test_FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey_Invitations where Survey_Status in ('No Response','Abandoned','In Progress','Scheduled')
))
